## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Public API / README updated if needed
- [ ] Added a changeset (`npx changeset`) if this affects published behavior
